method.name: deterministic_action_contract_layer
method.decision_policy: Convert ontology statuses and review reasons into deterministic next-action contracts. These contracts say what to do next; they do not accept new document or semantic claims by themselves.

parser_observations.message: Action contracts make the document ontology actionable without accepting new structural or semantic claims.
Accepted data views are marked ready for downstream graph assembly; review-required items receive explicit next-action contracts.
4 contracts are blocked by view-state authority separation and require review before visual absence claims are allowed.
Domain refs remain unused in action contract generation; they are reserved for later semantic ontology stages.
